snippet.title: Coral Futures Institute
snippet.description:
Ocean science and reef conservation content from the Coral Futures Institute, Kāne'ohe, Oahu. We share reef monitoring updates, marine ecology education, and community science highlights from Kāne'ohe Bay and beyond.

Channel managed by Lorraine Roach (lroach_reef). Viewer inquiries: info@coralfuturesinstitute.org

channel.title: Coral Futures Institute
channel.description: Reef monitoring, coral resilience science, and ocean conservation education from Kāne'ohe Bay, Oahu.
channel.keywords: coral reef marine ecology reef monitoring kāneʻohe bay coral resilience ocean conservation GIS marine biology Hawaii scuba diving
